creator: freebsd@khaotic.net
text:
To follow recent editors/emacs update (23.3 -> 23.4), japanese/mozc-el needs to be reinstalled.

Fix: increment PORTREVISION
How-To-Repeat: Run update Emacs 23.4 without reinstalling japanese/mozc-el.

----
Warning (initialization): An error occurred while loading `/home/user/.emacs.d/init.el':

File error: Cannot open load file, mozc

To ensure normal operation, you should investigate and remove the
cause of the error in your initialization file.  Start Emacs with
the `--debug-init' option to view a complete error backtrace.
----
